records.question: Which molecules have atoms with element equal to 'zn' and also have bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'zn'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM atom AS T2 WHERE T2.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id AND T2.element = 'zn' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bond AS T3 WHERE T3.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id )

records.question: What molecules with a label of + contain bromine atoms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'br' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '+' AND T2.element = 'Br'

records.question: Which molecules that have at least one atom with element equal to 'na' and at least one bond also have the label equal to '-'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'na'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
INNER JOIN atom AS T2
  ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.element = 'na'

INTERSECT

SELECT T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
INNER JOIN bond AS T2
  ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id

INTERSECT

SELECT T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
WHERE T1.label = '-'

records.question: Which molecules have a label that is '-' and contain atoms where the element is exactly 'na'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'na'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '-' AND T2.element = 'na'

records.question: Which molecules have a label of '-' and contain phosphorus atoms connected by single bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND atom.element = 'p'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN atom AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id INNER JOIN connected AS T4 ON (T2.atom_id = T4.atom_id AND T3.atom_id = T4.atom_id2) OR (T2.atom_id = T4.atom_id2 AND T3.atom_id = T4.atom_id) INNER JOIN bond AS T5 ON T4.bond_id = T5.bond_id WHERE T1.label = '-' AND T2.element = 'P' AND T3.element = 'P' AND T5.bond_type = 'single' AND T2.atom_id != T3.atom_id

records.question: Which molecules have a negative label and contain carbon atoms connected by triple bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '#' AND atom.element = 'c' AND molecule.label = '-'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN connected AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id INNER JOIN atom AS T4 ON T3.atom_id = T4.atom_id INNER JOIN atom AS T5 ON T3.atom_id2 = T5.atom_id WHERE T1.label LIKE '-%' AND T2.bond_type = 'triple' AND (T4.element = 'C' OR T5.element = 'C')

records.question: Which molecules contain bonds that are exactly triple bonds?

records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = 'Triple'

records.question: Which molecules labeled + contain atoms with element na and have bonds where bond_type is -?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'na' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 WHERE T1.label = '+' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM atom AS T2 WHERE T2.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id AND T2.element = 'na' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bond AS T3 WHERE T3.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id AND T3.bond_type = '-' )

records.question: Which molecules have a label of '-' and contain fluorine atoms connected by bonds that are exactly double bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '=' AND molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
WHERE T1.label = '-' AND T1.molecule_id IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT A1.molecule_id
  FROM atom AS A1
  JOIN connected AS C
    ON A1.atom_id = C.atom_id
  JOIN atom AS A2
    ON C.atom_id2 = A2.atom_id
  JOIN bond AS B
    ON C.bond_id = B.bond_id
  WHERE
    A1.element = 'F' AND A2.element = 'F' AND B.bond_type = 'Double' AND A1.molecule_id = A2.molecule_id AND A1.molecule_id = B.molecule_id
)

records.question: Which molecules that have related atoms and related bonds have a bond with bond_type exactly '#' and have a label exactly '+'?

SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '#' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
INNER JOIN bond AS T2
  ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE
  T1.label = '+' AND T2.bond_type = '#' AND EXISTS(
    SELECT
      1
    FROM
      atom AS T3
    WHERE
      T3.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id
  )
